highlights.text: Readers were prepared because for the 1st time in weeks my Bear Case triggered and we began a sell bounces period all week.
I wrote on Monday at 4pm: “Bear case tomorrow: Begins under 6857… I t will probably be 6850 trigger.
Late day yesterday bulls tried a bounce, putting in a Failed Breakdown of Tuesday’s 6748 down to 6732, recovering, and squeezing to 6784.
ES at the same time put in a Failed Breakdown of Tuesday’s 6748 low.

If bulls can’t stick this, they are likely in trouble…Its very simple and bulls need to hold 6748-51 (and not invalidate the Failed Breakdown and lose today’s low).” ES lost that low, and down we went for another 70 points.
Readers know though that every elevator down sell comes a face ripping squeeze, but only when ES recovers a major low.
I wrote yesterday: “ It is much smarter to wait for the Failed Breakdown of the October 22nd 6690 low.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the 100 point long we saw Tuesday into Wednesday (caused by a Failed Breakdown) then the 100 point sell we saw yesterday (caused by a Back-Test Short).

post_title: Second Biggest Weekly Sell Since April For SPX. Are We Bottoming? November 10th Plan
